briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings after fintech middleware company Synapse collapsed into bankruptcy, highlighting critical risks in bank-fintech partnerships.

- **[Goodbye Visa and Mastercard: 130M Europeans switching to sovereign payment](https://www.lesnumeriques.com/banque-en-ligne/adieu-visa-et-mastercard-130-millions-d-europeens-basculent-vers-un-paiement-100-souverain-des-2026-n250918.html)** — *Hacker News* — Over 130 million Europeans are set to transition to a sovereign, homegrown payment network, reducing reliance on US card giants Visa and Mastercard.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple has acquired UK-based open banking startup Credit Kudos, signalling the tech giant's deepening ambitions in financial data and consumer credit services.

- **[Would you give an AI agent your credit card? Companies are betting so](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/ai-shopping-agentic-payments-9.7222389?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Businesses are increasingly building agentic AI systems designed to make purchases autonomously on behalf of consumers, raising new questions about trust, liability, and payment security.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Would you give an AI agent your credit card? Companies are betting so](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/ai-shopping-agentic-payments-9.7222389?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Canadian consumers and businesses are being drawn into the emerging world of agentic AI payments, where AI systems shop and transact independently on users' behalf.

- **[GST top-up payments begin Friday for eligible Canadians](https://www.cbc.ca/news/canada/gst-rebate-top-up-payments-coming-9.7222566?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — The federal government began issuing GST top-up payments to eligible Canadians, a direct financial inclusion measure supporting lower-income households.

- **[Canada's AI strategy draws mixed reviews from across tech ecosystem](https://betakit.com/canadas-ai-strategy-draws-mixed-reviews-from-across-the-tech-ecosystem/)** — *BetaKit* — Canada's newly released national AI strategy is drawing varied reactions from the tech community, with debates around whether it goes far enough to support startups and innovation.

- **[Canada's AI strategy looks to shift government from startup supporter to stakeholder](https://betakit.com/canadas-ai-strategy-looks-to-shift-government-from-startup-supporter-to-stakeholder/)** — *BetaKit* — The federal AI strategy signals a policy pivot where the government aims to become a direct stakeholder in Canadian AI companies rather than simply a grants-based funder.

- **[Inovia promotes Mia Morisset to partner on growth team](https://betakit.com/inovia-promotes-mia-morisset-to-partner-on-growth-team/)** — *BetaKit* — Leading Canadian VC firm Inovia Capital has promoted Mia Morisset to partner on its growth team, reinforcing the firm's capacity to back scaling Canadian tech and fintech companies.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)**  — *Hacker News* — Canada's early commitment to replacing screen scraping with secure open banking APIs remains a foundational reference point for Atlantic Canadian credit unions and fintechs navigating Canada's still-evolving open banking framework.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A detailed analysis of how open banking reshapes payments competition, offering valuable context for Atlantic Canadian fintechs and credit unions preparing for Canada's open banking implementation.

- **[Why scaling requires more than speed](https://betakit.com/why-scaling-requires-more-than-speed/)** — *BetaKit* — This piece on the nuances of startup scaling is directly relevant to Atlantic Fintech's ecosystem-building mission, offering strategic insight for founders in the region looking to grow sustainably beyond early-stage momentum.
